summary: Backend-only testing for Rare Shot Live Wallpaper. All 7 pytest tests passed. Google Photos scraping endpoint returns 34 photos from the test album URL. Status endpoints work correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_rareshot_client status check via POST /api/status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully functional. Google Photos scraping returns 34 photos from test album (lh3.googleusercontent.com URLs with url, thumbnail, name fields). Frontend expo-av plugin crash was reportedly fixed - frontend testing should be done next.
